name: Claude Code Repo Digest
description: A read-only Claude Code run that summarizes a repository into a Markdown digest on a schedule (e.g. weekly). Tools are locked to read/search only; the printed digest is written to a report file.

parameters.label: Repository path
parameters.help: Absolute path to the local git repository.

parameters.label: Digest prompt
parameters.default: Summarize the notable changes, open TODOs, and anything that looks risky in this repository into a concise Markdown digest.
parameters.help: What to summarize. Read-only tools only — avoid single quotes.

parameters.label: Max turns
parameters.help: Abort the run after this many agentic turns.

parameters.label: Report file path
parameters.help: Where the Markdown digest is written.
